summary:
SPIRITUAL ENCOUNTERS AND IMPARTATION: Brandon recounts experiencing the tangible glory of God in his hotel room and during a prayer conference in Branson, Missouri. He notes that God chose Branson, a tourist hotspot on the New Madrid fault attracting millions annually, as a central location for a major spiritual awakening and revival. Brandon details a powerful moment of spiritual impartation when Sister Lynne, a respected prayer leader, laid hands on his wife Diana, causing her arm to shake continuously under the power of the Holy Spirit. Emphasizing the importance of authentic faith, Brandon rejects fake religious performances and superficial manifestations, validating the genuine presence of God at the event where a former Palestinian attendee named Max reported seeing Jesus walking among the congregation.

END TIMES URGENCY AND GLOBAL CONFLICTS: Brandon stresses the critical urgency of the end times, warning that the dispensation of grace is rapidly closing ahead of the return of Jesus Christ. He discusses escalating global tensions, specifically pointing to the conflict between Ukraine and Russia. Brandon mentions Ukrainian President Zelensky's request for Tomahawk missiles and Russian President Putin's warnings against deep strikes into Moscow. He urges believers to pray against provoking adversaries to avert or delay World War III, noting that such escalations could severely impact nations like Poland and Romania. Furthermore, Brandon prophesies about a significant move of God in Asia, predicting the removal of North Korean leaders Kim Jong-un and his sister, which will open the door for a massive harvest of souls across North Korea, South Korea, and China.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND POLITICAL WARNINGS: Brandon shares alarming prophetic visions concerning the United States, including a Red Dawn scenario and domestic terrorist attacks. He describes a specific vision of a tall building engulfed in flames, which serves as a booby-trapped decoy designed to lure and destroy first responders while the primary catastrophic event occurs elsewhere. Alongside these security threats, Brandon underscores the vital importance of the upcoming 2026 elections leading up to America's 250th anniversary. He calls for fervent prayer to secure a red wave that maintains control of the Senate and House to ensure the appointment of righteous judges. Additionally, Brandon strongly warns against participating in Halloween festivities, including church events, viewing them as dangerous spiritual gateways for demonic forces to attack families and communities.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF HARVEST AND WEATHER DECREES: Brandon details a symbolic vision of a school cafeteria filled with hot, untouched food and floating red hearts, overseen by lunch ladies wearing retro masks. He interprets this as God preparing a table of spiritual nourishment and love for a massive incoming wave of unsaved loved ones and new believers who are ready to be educated in the faith. Transitioning to authoritative prayer, Brandon issues spiritual decrees to manipulate weather patterns, specifically calling for heavy, drought-breaking rains over Australia and commanding shifts in the American jet streams to prevent winter wildfires. He concludes by executing spiritual deliverance for a specific individual with a dark, death-obsessed past involving voodoo, declaring her completely free from demonic attachments and officially welcomed into the Christian faith.
rawData: [October 18, 2025]-[Let's pray today]-[https://youtu.be/JJiG596K_R0]-[Your other screen don't work, but you have one screen. Let me know when people are here, son; I can't tell here. Is it good? Yeah, it's not. I'm saying seven. It's saying seven right now, but—well, good morning, good evening. Thank you for joining so quickly. We're waiting; we're having a lot of technical issues. That's why I'm late. That's why I usually do not announce when I'm coming on here live. The enemy does not like this prayer time, obviously. And so, I'm not frustrated. I know that we're a threat. You know, it's exciting when you know you're poking them in the eye. But we've had a lot of stuff going on with all our internet and our cameras and everything else, so it's been a little bit of a hiccup here today. So, is it working now? Everything's good? 800? Okay, good. Well, praise the Lord. Well, good afternoon, good evening, and good night, whatever, wherever you are in the world. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to just take right off. I don't have a lot of time here now because I'm a little behind. So, I'm going to just get right into it and pray with y'all. Yesterday when we were praying, the glory of the Lord filled our hotel room, and it was—I told Braden, we all felt it—it was the peace that passes all understanding, just that weightiness of the presence of God filled this room. And I was surprised, honestly. I mean, you're in a hotel that's not your house and, you know, on the road like this, and the glory of the Lord shows up like that. I was just in awe at just the presence of the Lord, and it was just exciting that the Lord would visit like that. We've been at the prayer conference and praying over what they feel led to pray over concerning America and things like that. But my heart is going to tell you this: Jesus Christ is coming. You must know this. You must have an urgency about our Father's return. It is time that the body of Christ has urgency and wakes up. We are in the last of the last of the last seconds before the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. We see the wars and the rumors of wars. We see Israel and what's going on with Israel, watching the fig tree. But as we pray today, the enemy within—we'll just pick up where we left off yesterday with the terrorist attacks. I know what the Lord is showing me. They were picking up on some of it today concerning July the 4th of this year because it's an anniversary year. It's the big celebration. I think it's 200 and some years or whatever it is, the 250th for the United States of America. But what I'm picking up on is way before July of 2026. We must pray for our elections in 2026 for sure. This is a major hot spot for everything that I'm getting concerning November of next year. This time next year, I pray we've already prayed this thing through. We don't need to be coming up to the wire and praying it through; we need to tackle this thing now. The elections of 2026, if we do not keep the Senate and the House and get some better judges in our nation, it won't do any good to even have the presidency. We must keep the Senate with more of a majority and the House to push through some of the things that I have seen. Now, I believe that we have—there's power in numbers, there's power in prayer. And it's so exciting to meet some of you all. I met some people from Sweden today, some from Mexico, and another man who just saw me. I said, "Are you here for the prayer conference?" He said, "No, I just came here for a vacation." You know, Branson, Missouri is a major hot spot for vacation for a lot of people. And Sister Billie said that today, that an average of 8 million people come through here every single year. And when I was driving around today, the Lord said, "I told you this." He said, "I'm getting it ready for the revival. Do you remember what I said?" I said, "Yes, Lord, you picked a good spot. 8 million visitors a year." And she said, "That's more people that visit here than visit Israel." And I was like, "That's amazing for this little bitty town, that we have more visitors come here in this little area in Branson, Missouri than Israel has in all of the tourist season of Israel in a whole entire single year." That's amazing. So, it shows why the Lord picked Branson, Missouri for a major revival, because there's already all these people coming here. So, He picked a hot spot in America. He said, "I choose to pick the central part of America on the New Madrid fault. This is going to be a major place for a major shaking to awaken, and a great revival will come to Branson, Missouri." And as I was driving around today, the roads were so congested with so many people coming here for fall break, I just thought, you know, like Sister Billie always says, "Oh, what a plan. Oh, what a planner." And I'm telling you all, I have such high expectations. I can, as I'm in the exact spot where I've always seen the visions looking out over where the sun is setting, looking out and the Lord's saying, "Brandon, this dispensation of grace is coming to an end. The ark door is closing. Jesus is coming." Do you understand, ladies and gentlemen? We're about to have the greatest harvest of souls. And I say that all the time, but I want to be that steady drum that keeps warning you about what's coming. So, we see Zelensky in the White House today asking for Tomahawks. And I said, "This is not a coincidence." I saw this way before they are even talking about this, folks. And here President Trump—oh, and then Putin had the meeting there saying, "We need to talk about this. We don't want those long-range missiles coming into Moscow." And the reach was way beyond Moscow for what these missiles are able to do. But Zelensky was putting a demand on the relationship with the United States of America stating that he wanted long-range missiles to go way deep into Russia, and we don't want that. So, that's why we're praying, because I believe prayer changes things. But it is important that we realize that we are going to avert World War III in a great capacity in some areas. Now, can we stop the whole thing? No. But I believe we can stop some of it. We can cause some peace in some of it, maybe delay some of it, I don't know. But the Lord said some of this stuff is going to happen because His Word said it would. So, we see these things happening in the news and what they're talking about, and I'm like—I told Diana, I said, "You know what's amazing to me is whenever you're seeing it in prayer weeks before, and then you start seeing it in the news weeks after, right?" And you just go, "Wow, Lord. Wow. Wow. Nothing happens on this earth before He reveals it to His servants, the prophets, and I believe the watchmen of this generation." He said, "I'm bringing in my closers." And He keeps bringing that up to me. It's time for impartation. You know what was interesting? I felt to talk to one of the key head prayer people, Sister Lynne. And I told D, I said, "I feel I just would like her to pray for us because she's a general. She's been—she's taught us prayer our whole entire lives. I mean, since we were little kids walking around, you know, barely in diapers." And it was an honor that she would even talk to us, and she's excited because she says she watches our channel and stuff. And she laid hands on Diana. And I've never seen the power of God move on my wife like that other than when we've been at some Billy Burke meetings. But my wife's hand shook under the power of God, which I don't understand why, but it shook under the power of God. Now, usually it's always the whole being—you can feel it and it goes in you—but her right hand, where Sister Lyn Hammond prayed for my wife and grabbed a hold of her hand, shook for over an hour and she couldn't control it. It was just under the power of God. Her whole arm was; she could feel it from her fingers all the way up to her shoulder. Come and tell them. You're sitting here. You tell them. I ain't going to steal her thunder. Here, you can sit on my lap. You want to sit right here? I don't have to—you told it really good. I know. Can you see her? All right. Tell them. Yeah. Whenever she laid hands on us and prayed, she put her hand right here on my arm. And when she did, I felt the power of God go into my arm. And it went all the way from here to my elbow. And it traveled. It kind of stopped right there, but it was all through my hand. And I just felt it vibrating like a vibration, like a current. And I was watching my hand, and I was like—she was praying and I was feeling it—and I was thinking, 'Wow, this is like my hand. I can feel the power of God.' And I was just weeping. And then she put her hand up here on my shoulder, and I felt it come all the way down my arm clear to my elbow, and it went all the way up and down. My whole hand was just under the power for over an hour. It was like being electrocuted. Yes. And it really was amazing because I've never seen you do that. And even our littlest was like, 'Daddy, can Mommy control her hand?' Because Paisley was just staring at it, you know, because her mom's hand was sitting there just shaking. And it was just amazing to see that. I knew there was impartation—there's something, because that's just not normal for us. And we don't put on—we ain't here for a show. We don't care. You know, it's like to us, we're just Brandon and Diana, you know, and there's no performance. You get what you get. I'm not here to try to entertain you. And that's why I've always maintained that. Keep being authentic. No matter how much it gets bigger, don't try to be a performance. There is no time for performance. It's fake. I don't like fake Christianity. I don't like fake Holy Ghost stuff. No, I want the real, authentic move and touch of the power of God. And if it's not, I don't want it at all. I'm not here, you know. I see some people and you think, 'Is that real? Is that whatever?' And I don't try to judge them, but I'm saying there are a lot of times you realize that their flesh is involved more than the spirit, you know, and I'm just like, 'I don't want to be one of those.' But I realize when my wife is getting a touch from the Lord, and it's authentic, because Diana is a no-nonsense person. And so, it's the same with me. I'm a no-nonsense person. I don't play Holy Ghost. It's either real or it's not. And because I see, I don't give any courtesy falls. If the power of God's not there to knock me on my heinie, I don't want it, you know. I'll resist it more than anything. And so I just say, 'Hey,' because I'm not going to let you push me down, either—'Holy Ghost push.' You know, people try to push you down in the name of the power of God and try to make you go down, and you're like, 'No, that's not the power of God. That's you knocking me down with your hand. Stop with your nonsense.' But I'm just saying, you know when the Lord is authentically touching somebody, and my wife got a touch today, and I was so thankful for that. I told her, I said, 'We're Holy Ghost junkies. We're going to find the authentic.' And Sister Lynn touched Diana today, and it was pretty awesome. So I just wanted to tell you all that, you know. Love you, baby. So pretty cool. That's not you. Don't you understand what I'm saying? You get the anointing of push on you, and they ain't going to have the anointing of push, and they start going, and you go, 'That's not the anointing of the Holy Ghost. You're trying to push people down.' And they give you a courtesy fall because you're pushing their head off. But I just like, you know, I want authentic. And there has been something authentic in our life, and we've touched it and tasted it, and I'm telling you, the Holy Spirit is real, and it puts a bad taste in some people's mouths whenever it's not. Now, I get off on that because I come across people and they say, 'Well, is this real? Is it? Is it not?' And I'm telling you, it's real. When I've been prayed for by Billy Burke, you can't stand; the glory comes in. And last night when we had the move of God, Max, who is an Arab-American now—he got radically saved—was a Palestinian, right? Is that right? He saw Jesus walking around in the auditorium, and I knew it was authentic because of the way he said it. Now, not every vision do I believe; when somebody says they're seeing things, I just go, 'Whatever.' But this man I know is authentic. His name is Max, and he said he saw Jesus walking around last night in the service. But you could feel it. You could feel the tangible presence of God last night. Diana and I were in there. We could see the mist. And, like I said, I don't try to get all hyper-spiritual about stuff. If it's there, it's there. If it's not, it's not. And it was there. It was the same. Diana said it wasn't as thick as what we saw in the tent last year at this meeting when we went to the mountain and we went out there. They have the fish fry and all the things that are on Monday, and that's when the Holy Spirit was so strong. We even saw it; it was so thick you couldn't see through it—the glory cloud. Last night, we started worshiping, and the glory of the Lord came in, and it was tangible. Now, I didn't see Jesus, but Max did, and I think another man. Right. So, he was walking around the aisles examining the troops, examining his children. And when we were up there and they were worshiping, they started singing the song. And she started singing, and the glory of the Lord came into the building, and, ladies and gentlemen, I kid you not, you could see a mist in the atmosphere. There was a heavy dew; you could feel it. Now, I don't know if everybody could see it, but there were quite a few that said they did, and you could feel the presence—the tangible presence of God. And I'm all about it. I told Sister Billie today, I said, 'I could park myself in a meeting like that and never leave.' People were—she told everybody they could go home because it was already so late, and people didn't want to leave. Some of them left, which I think—they missed out big time. The people who left, I just don't, honest to goodness, I don't know how you can leave a service and say, 'Well, I'm going home to go to bed.' What else is there to stay up for? If God's there and the glory cloud's there, you couldn't pay me a million dollars to want to leave that. I mean, seriously, the tangible presence of God is in the building, folks, and you want to go lay on your pillow? Forget it. I mean, there ain't nothing in this world—that's all that I'm living for is the presence and the glory. So, we could feel it. You could feel the tangible presence, and you could feel the weightiness of his presence. But like I said, Max was blessed with the vision of it, to see the Lord Jesus walking around looking at people. Some people were experiencing angels and things like that, but it was more that didn't than did. But the glory, everybody—I think you would have to be spiritually dead not to feel it. I mean seriously, the atmosphere was tangible—the presence of God. I'm so grateful, so thankful to experience the glory, so grateful. There is nothing like it, there's nothing like it. And for all the people who traveled—they had people from, like I said, South Korea, they had people from China, they had people from all over the globe. They brought them up today and were talking about it. It was so cool to see so many people came from so many different places. And the people from Switzerland. Two different people from Switzerland. And I didn't realize there are that many different dialects in Switzerland. German, Italian, French—three different languages in different sectors. I didn't realize that. So we had the French represented here, and we had the Germans, from what I understood. So I thought, 'Well, praise God.' But really, really beautiful, really beautiful what the Lord is doing, but I'm expecting even more. You know, I know there's more. I know there's more. And I believe we are just entering in—first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation. I believe for this revival that we're experiencing, I believe we're just entering into it. You can just barely see that blade coming up out of the ground for what's about to happen. It's just barely peeking through. You know, when you just get that seed, that little hatchling, the little seed is just barely poking itself through the soil. And I believe even like, you know, some people are talking about a turning point and all this stuff. Yes, but there's something so much more coming on the edge of time. All the stuff that's happening, folks, I'm telling you, we are right there. I even told Pastor Chip, one of the pastors, I told him, 'We've got to stop saying it's coming and start saying it's here.' And he said that's exactly what the Lord was telling him. But I believe when we start saying it's here, the glory is here. The glory and the manifested presence of the Lord is here. It's not coming. We're not going to experience it later on. Because if it's always coming, something is coming all the time. But I started thinking, get the mindset of expectation for the manifestation now. Why is it always tomorrow? It's like believing God always for tomorrow for your deliverance, for your marriage to get better. 'Well, tomorrow's going to get better.' Why not now? Why not have your expiration date to what you're believing for now? Why not believe for the exceedingly abundantly above all that you would ask or think now? So, I'm believing for it tonight. I'm believing for it tomorrow. I'm believing right now. Let's just always stay in that constant state of being, in that constant state of believing that you receive it when you come together and you fellowship like that. And I thought, you know, it's a pull. You pull it. You can pull it. And it was cool because Sister Lynn was talking about praying for North Korea today and getting over in those rivers and praying, because, you know, she said it was interesting—I love her illustrations—she was talking about how there's no pictures, there's really no information about North Korea because it's so closed off. It's a wall. But as you pray into something, she said she takes her notebook and she writes everything about North Korea, what she's getting about that in prayer. And after a while, she has notebooks full, a prayer journal of everything that she has gotten from the Holy Spirit concerning North Korea. So I have gotten all this stuff about North Korea and praying into that, about what the Lord has told us—that He was going to remove a tyrant, that He was going to remove Kim Jong-un, and that his days were numbered, that his sister's days were numbered, that God was going to give North Korea a window of opportunity for a major outpouring of the Spirit of God, and that there would be a great harvest of souls in the days to come concerning North Korea and South Korea and China and basically all of Asia. And He said, 'We're going to have a major move of God in Asia.' So that's what we're believing for. He said, 'I have not forgotten my Asians. I have not forgotten the Asians. They have felt that they have been forgotten.' But the Lord said, 'Brandon, I have not forgotten my Asians, and there is going to be the greatest harvest of souls that they've ever experienced, ever in all of time, that Asia will have a move of God.' And that's what we're believing for. So, going back to—I don't want to get sidetracked—going back to the Tomahawks now, President Trump right now is negotiating and talking about sending some long-range missiles into there, trying to stiff-arm Putin. And I said, 'Don't poke the bear.' Remember, every single thing we're getting: don't poke the bear, don't send these long-range missiles. So, as we're praying into that, I believe we can stop some of that to delay it and make it not happen, because this is going to be very bad for Poland and Romania and some of these other nations. But as we see the enemy within the Red Dawn experience, the Lord said, 'We must pray for America because of what I saw yesterday concerning the major building that was on fire at the top.' And He said, 'This is the distraction from the main thing. This building was to attract the firefighters, the emergency crew responders, from the main event.' And I saw tripwires in buildings that were booby-trapped, that when the firefighters walked in, it was over—that they were rigged for a catastrophic event on purpose to delay and to cause a distraction from what they're trying to do over at another place. Does that make sense, what I'm trying to tell y'all? It was a deterrent. That's a good word, a deterrent. So, that's what we're going to pray into a little bit more today in this little bit of time that we have left here. So, I hope I gave you a little bit of something to get you excited. It's time, folks. I want you to have an expectation that God is going to show up and show off in your life. Have expectation. It's not just Brandon, it's not just Diana or Billy or Lynn or Pastor Chip or Candace or whoever, it's you. God has a plan for you. God has a plan to do something for you. You might live in some hole-in-the-wall, this little podunk town in America, or in Australia or whatever, and you've got less than a population of a thousand people, and you're going, 'How is God going to do anything in this little bitty town with less than 500 people in it?' But you're there and you're watching online right now, and you're praying for your town, and you could be the one that brings revival to save that whole entire little village, that whole entire little town. And you are the one that carries the fire. And you go, 'Why did God place me here?' Because you are called to those people. You never know. Maybe He's telling you to move on. Maybe He's telling you it's time to pack your bags and move into a big city. I don't know, but I know that God put you where you are right now, maybe just for this season, just for—you're called to the Kingdom for such a time as this. And it could be there just for that, for a major revival in that little town, and you're the first one. All it takes is—how to start a fire? It just takes a spark. And you could be the spark that lights that fire. Just know that nothing's by coincidence. You're there and God has you. You can say, 'Well, everybody, all they do over here is do drugs and sleep around and everything, drinking at the bars on Friday nights, and we don't ever have any...' You could be the one that starts a Holy Ghost fire in there and has a tent revival or your little church, and you're feeling it, and the Holy Ghost shows up. I thought, you know, when I told Diana—we were talking about it—what attracts us to these meetings, going to healing services like Billye's and Billy, both Billys, is the anointing. All it takes is a spark. All it takes is that tangible. You couldn't pull me away from it. I'm like a dog on a bone. That's what it takes. And I thought, how did you get that? By spending time. T-I-M-E. Time. That's what sitting at the feet of the Father with time brings: relationship. And I thought—Diana and I talk about it—there's no microwave. It's a slow cooker. It's relationship, just like you have with—you don't force your relationship with your spouse. What develops a relationship with your wife or with your husband? Time. Well, 'I want—we've got to have a crash course right now. I want to know everything about you in the next 10 minutes. You're going to tell me everything from your childhood, and I want you to tell me, and I'm going to time it, and then you're going to tell me, and then I'm going to know everything about you, and then we're going to be so good with each other.' That wouldn't work, would it? She'd look at me and go, 'Are you kidding me? This is not a microwave. It has taken time, years.' And I still find out stuff all the time. We talk about things and you go, 'Okay, well, I like your likes and your dislikes and everything else.' But that's the way it is with the Lord. But it's by refiner's fire. And we come up higher every day. And you come up higher with the fire. And every day you go from glory to glory to glory. And people want something quick. And that's why I told Brianna, I'm willing to pay the price to get whatever it takes to get there—meetings like this, dipping in the river, praying, doing these videos, doing whatever it takes because I want Him. What does it take to get the manifested presence with Him? We know that that's what breaks the yoke, that's what sets people free. None of this other stuff. You go into a church service and you just—I don't want church usual. I want church unusual. You get something when you go, and you don't walk away going, 'What was that? I'm wasting my time.' I want His presence. When you go, man, 'Father, thank you for that fresh drink.' But I don't rely on my pastors to bring that to me all the time. I get it myself. You get it yourself. How desperate, how bad do you want change in your life? I don't sit there and go, 'Well, it's like a baby wanting their diaper changed.' After you grow up, you don't have to have your diaper changed anymore because you've grown up. Well, I don't have to have somebody feed me anymore because I feed myself. Well, I learned how to cook myself. I learned how to do that. The older you get, the further along with the Lord you get. I'm able to go say, 'You know what? I know how to go to the drive-thru if I need to. I know how to go to the grocery store and fix it, but I don't have to go by and say, Mom, Dad, I need you to go and get me something because I'm hungry.' They're saying, 'You're an adult. Go get it yourself.' You know what I'm saying? That's the way it is. I really truly believe, the more you grow spiritually, it's time for a lot of people to grow up and stop being babies. We've got to get our armor on and get ready for what's coming. Most people don't want to recognize it. Most people are afraid of it. What's coming? Do I believe it? It's like I see part of the charismatic movement—I want to say the Word of Faith people—they are so strong on, 'We're not going to experience anything at all. We're underneath the glory and the glory's coming because this prophet said this and that prophet said that,' but I'm telling you we are in this world. I know we're not of it, but we're going to see some things. But it doesn't have to be—I'm not going to participate in the drama, right? So I know the glory is on my household. And as He is, so are we in this world. And as Diana and I walk into the world, we touch and shed the light, but we're still going to see it. It doesn't make it disappear. It just means I'm not going to get into the drama of it. The sky is not falling in my house. It may be falling out there, but it ain't falling because why? Because the Holy Ghost is dwelling on the inside of me and He's giving me authority. Now, we know that in Matthew 24, these things are going to happen. This is the beginning of sorrows. So, you're not going to stop that. There's going to be plagues. There's going to be wars. There's going to be rumors of wars. So, we're going to see these things, civil unrest, these things. But where are we supposed to be? We're supposed to be in that position of, 'Hey, we have our catcher's mitts on, people. Hey, you need Jesus. Can I pray for you? Fear not. Fear not.' So, praise God. I'm not afraid and neither is anybody else. But I'm going to tell you, I know what's coming. And the glory is coming and it'll be as thick as a quarter. I've tried to say it a thousand times. The dark's going to get darker and the light is going to get lighter. We are in the last of the last days and we're fixing to see even more, a greater acceleration of things than we've ever seen before. So, Father, I just thank you. I don't have communion today. I ran out of communion. My wife brought me one for travel. So, we're just going to pray. Father, I thank you, Lord, as you show me. I plead the blood of Jesus over my eyes. And I thank you, Lord, that we have angels that keep charge over me. And anything and everything that I see, Father, I judge it. And I thank you, Lord. Hey, I can do it with a chip. That'll work. I'll take it with a chip. And just give me some of that sparkling tea right there. That tea. That'll work. We have lots at home now. But I'm in a hotel room. So, I want to clarify that. I'm not saying I don't have communion. I have communion, but I don't have it at the hotel. So, this will work today. This will work. You forgive me? I'm not trying to be disrespectful to Catholics. I'm not trying to be disrespectful. You know, I have a lot of people from a lot of different backgrounds and they got really offended when I did this last time. I'm not trying to be disrespectful.
